sqlMap.insert: insert into Deductibles(AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, CoverageKey LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp DeductibleSequence ) values (#AggregateDeductible:NUMERIC#, #OccuranceDeductible:NUMERIC#, #CoverageKey:NUMERIC# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #DeductibleSequence# )
sqlMap.select: select AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DeductibleSequence, CoverageKey from Deductibles where AggregateDeductible = #AggregateDeductible# and OccuranceDeductible = #OccuranceDeductible# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey#
sqlMap.update:
update Deductibles set
LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null DeductibleSequence = #DeductibleSequence# DeductibleSequence = null
where AggregateDeductible = #AggregateDeductible# and OccuranceDeductible = #OccuranceDeductible# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from Deductibles where AggregateDeductible = #AggregateDeductible# and OccuranceDeductible = #OccuranceDeductible# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey#
sqlMap.select: select AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DeductibleSequence, CoverageKey from Deductibles where AggregateDeductible = #AggregateDeductible# and OccuranceDeductible = #OccuranceDeductible# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey#
select AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, CoverageKey, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, DeductibleSequence from Deductibles where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey#
select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,d.AggregateDeductible),1),2) as DeductibleAmount,d.DeductibleSequence from Deductibles d where CoverageKey=#CoverageKey#
